description: Carry your essentials to the office, in style. Show off your support for conservation of nature and encourage others to join in your effort by sporting these environment-friendly bags from timberland. Made from organic fabrics, this messenger bag from timberland speaks volumes about your personality.Made with aniline leather lending it a rugged look, to help reduce environment impact Water resistantOne internal organiser pocketTwo external organiser pockets with two side chambersPadded shoulder strap for easy carryExternal sleeve on the back to carry the bag in your handsSnap closures for tight FitCare  Do not machine wash  Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
